# thoth_billing_reports (Data Source)

Reads billing report summaries for recent closed billing periods.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `reports_json` (String) Billing report summaries as JSON array.
- `response_json` (String) Full billing report summary response payload as JSON.
- `total` (Number) Total report summaries returned.
